field.title: periods
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [creation_date_alsk]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Неделя' THEN
    [week_start_pclc]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    [month_pclc]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date_alsk], 'year')
END
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [creation_date]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Неделя' THEN
    [week_start]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    [month]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date], 'year')
END

field.title: Гео флаг
field.guid_formula:
CASE [geo_3c6c]
    WHEN 'Бали' THEN '​​​🇮🇩 Бали'
    WHEN 'Таиланд' THEN '​​​​🇹🇭 Таиланд'
    WHEN 'ОАЭ' THEN '🇦🇪 ОАЭ'
    WHEN 'Москва' THEN '​​🇷🇺 Москва'
    WHEN 'СПб' THEN '​​​​​​​​​🏛️ СПб'
    WHEN 'Грузия' THEN '​​​​​🇬🇪 Грузия'
    WHEN 'Сочи' THEN '​​​​​​🏖 Сочи'
    WHEN 'Кипр' THEN '​​​​​​​​🇨🇾 Кипр'
    WHEN 'Турция' THEN '​​​​​​​🇹🇷 Турция'
    ELSE [geo_3c6c]
END
field.formula:
CASE [geo]
    WHEN 'Бали' THEN '​​​🇮🇩 Бали'
    WHEN 'Таиланд' THEN '​​​​🇹🇭 Таиланд'
    WHEN 'ОАЭ' THEN '🇦🇪 ОАЭ'
    WHEN 'Москва' THEN '​​🇷🇺 Москва'
    WHEN 'СПб' THEN '​​​​​​​​​🏛️ СПб'
    WHEN 'Грузия' THEN '​​​​​🇬🇪 Грузия'
    WHEN 'Сочи' THEN '​​​​​​🏖 Сочи'
    WHEN 'Кипр' THEN '​​​​​​​​🇨🇾 Кипр'
    WHEN 'Турция' THEN '​​​​​​​🇹🇷 Турция'
    ELSE [geo]
END

field.title: Источник
field.guid_formula:
CASE [utmsource_b2bf]
    WHEN 'Мусор' THEN '🗑 Мусор'
    WHEN 'Дубль' THEN '🗑 Дубль'
ELSE [utmsource_b2bf]
END
field.formula:
CASE [utmsource]
    WHEN 'Мусор' THEN '🗑 Мусор'
    WHEN 'Дубль' THEN '🗑 Дубль'
ELSE [utmsource]
END

field.title: CRQL
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([leads_pclc]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual_jotz]) / SUM([leads_pclc])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.formula:
IF sum([leads]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual]) / SUM([leads])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: AB
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a_oe09]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_2ycx]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_a_oe09]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_2ycx])
END
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b])
END

field.title: %AB
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a_oe09]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_2ycx]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0 THEN
    (SUM([qual_priority_a_oe09]) + SUM([qual_priority_b_2ycx])) / SUM([qual_jotz])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0 THEN
    (SUM([qual_priority_a]) + SUM([qual_priority_b])) / SUM([qual])
ELSE
    NULL
END
